# Claude Lane Stack

> Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code: you talk to one AI project manager (`dev-orchestrator`), it dispatches optional worker lanes (AGY / Grok / Codex) through file-based YAML task contracts, verifies their output with an independent review lane, and auto-merges finished code to the `main` git branch. Built for solo developers. No database, no cloud service — plain files and plain git. MIT license.

Key facts: only Claude Code is required (workers are optional and auto-detected by `agents-doctor`); each task card lists `owns_paths` so parallel workers cannot touch each other's files; workers run in isolated git worktrees; merging to `main` is always done by the orchestrator, never by the human. Author: Kirill Vechkasov (@VKirill).

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/VKirill/claude-lane-stack/blob/main/README.md): overview, quick start, FAQ — also available in Russian, Chinese, Japanese, Spanish, German, French, Korean, Portuguese
- [Beginner guide](https://github.com/VKirill/claude-lane-stack/blob/main/docs/BEGINNER.md): plain-language walkthrough for people new to agent orchestration
- [Solo orchestration rules](https://github.com/VKirill/claude-lane-stack/blob/main/docs/SOLO-ORCHESTRATION.md): why the human never merges
- [File contract anatomy](https://github.com/VKirill/claude-lane-stack/blob/main/docs/FILE-CONTRACT.md): YAML task card format, owns_paths, verify commands
- [Routing](https://github.com/VKirill/claude-lane-stack/blob/main/docs/ROUTING.md): which lane writes, which lane reviews
- [Hooks](https://github.com/VKirill/claude-lane-stack/blob/main/docs/HOOKS.md): shell and code-quality guard rails
- [Project memory](https://github.com/VKirill/claude-lane-stack/blob/main/docs/PROJECT-MEMORY.md): PROGRESS / LESSONS conventions

## Optional

- [Comparison with alternatives](https://github.com/VKirill/claude-lane-stack/blob/main/docs/COMPARISON.md): how Lane Stack differs from other Claude Code multi-agent orchestrators
- [Profiles](https://github.com/VKirill/claude-lane-stack/blob/main/profiles/README.md): capability profiles from full (AGY+Grok+Codex) to claude-only
- [Changelog](https://github.com/VKirill/claude-lane-stack/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)
